endpoints.description: Health check for local development, demos, and service orchestration.
Shared demo prompts for the web and email demo flows.

scenarios: What are the latest official datasets about electric vehicle charging stations in France?
Find official data about water quality in Paris.

endpoints.description: Main endpoint used by the web and email services. Accepts one natural-language query and returns a grounded answer based on selected official sources.

query.example: What official datasets are available for electric vehicle charging stations in France?

response_example.user_query: What official datasets are available for electric vehicle charging stations in France?

selected_sources.title: Fichier consolidé des Bornes de Recharge pour Véhicules Électriques (IRVE)
selected_sources.description: Base de données consolidée des infrastructures de recharge publique pour véhicules électriques.
selected_sources.reason_for_selection: This is the closest official match to the user query.

response_example.answer: Based on the selected data.gouv.fr sources, the strongest match is the IRVE dataset for public charging infrastructure in France.
limitations: This answer is grounded only in the selected official sources.
Freshness depends on the metadata returned by the upstream source.
